_comment: Profile P1 -- the Kitty Hawk working set (uci_mms_conversion_plan.md §5).
The UCI 2.5 messages the LA-CAL / Kitty Hawk work already exchanges:
the four hand-codec roots plus the two the Kitty Hawk consumer plan
needs.  Validation tier (a)+(b)+(c): offline XSD round-trip, golden
byte-equivalence against the frozen hand codec, and live Sleet.
